title: Today's Markets Brief: Micron, Semtech Spike Premarket; Zscaler Tumbles
summary: A quick look at the market's movers and shakers, with Micron, Semtech, and Zscaler making waves premarket.

body.text: Good morning, I'm Leo Stone. Let's dive into today's market movers. I am looking at a couple of interesting premarket moves. Micron and Semtech are both spiking, while Zscaler is tumbling. It's always exciting to see these big swings, and I'm curious to dig into what's driving them.

Micron and Semtech are seeing significant premarket gains. According to Investing.com, both stocks are up sharply, though specific numbers aren't available. My read is that this could be related to positive sentiment around the semiconductor sector, possibly driven by favorable earnings reports or industry trends. It's great to see companies in this space doing well – after all, who doesn't love a good tech rally?
Micron, Semtech spike premarket; Zscaler tumbles is also worth a quick mention. The point is not to force it into a giant theory; it is simply part of today's news mix.

Earnings live updates: Zscaler stock plunges 24% premarket on cautious guidance is also worth a quick mention. S&P 500 companies have largely reported solid results and printed profits so far, even amid ongoing r... The point is not to force it into a giant theory; it is simply part of today's news mix.

My quick read is that today's set of stories is useful because it gives us texture, not a sermon. Each item has its own little job: one tells us what changed, another tells us what people are worried about, and another gives the day its mood.
So that is the brief version: a few headlines, a little context, and just enough connective tissue to make the day easier to follow without turning the whole thing into homework.
